Email.subject: Early Access Pre-sale Launch: Custom Upgrades

Hi {{name}},

Get exclusive priority access to the latest collections at ORBIT.

WhatsApp.body: 👋 Hi *{{name}}*! Get pre-sale access to our top updates. Free shipping today. Reply *YES* to claim.

Atlas.explanation: Atlas selected WhatsApp as the channel with highest target engagement preference.

recommendation.summary: Deploy a high-frequency WhatsApp win-back loop targeting VIP spenders.

messages.text: I have segmented High-Value Inactive cohort as the ideal targets. Polaris isolated 14 top-spending accounts who have not ordered in the past 60 days.
I support this focus. Luna scanned checkout logs and found slippage in high-ltv billing loops. Est Revenue: ₹12,500
Target ROI looks highly viable. Reactivation forecasts indicate 4.8x returns yield. Expected Revenue: ₹38,500.
I have compiled responsive marketing assets for WhatsApp templates. Personalization handles are armed.
Gateways verified. Selected channel: WhatsApp. Dispatch buffers are ready for deployment.
